query:
SELECT 
  pv.id,
  pv.variantCode,
  pv.variantName,
  vp.sellingPriceFobL1,
  vp.sellingPriceFobL2,
  vp.sellingPriceFobL3,
  vp.sellingPriceRmbIncTax
FROM product_variants pv
LEFT JOIN variant_pricing vp ON pv.id = vp.variantId
WHERE pv.variantCode = 'DC-001-GRY-V033';
